title: Recantation of Galileo (June 22, 1633) - Famous Trials
highlights: abjure, curse, and detest the  ...    I, the said Galileo Galilei, have abjured, sworn, promised, and bound myself as above; and in witness of the truth thereof I have with my own hand subscribed the present document of my abjuration, and recited it word for word at Rome, in the Convent of Minerva, this twenty-second day of June, 1633. I, Galileo Galilei, have abjured as above with my own hand. [Galileo's Recantation excludes two points included in the original formula for abjuration presented to him by the Cardinals.
